home.heroSub: Tourists are searching for your restaurant right now. We build professional websites that put you on the map — and get you to the table. No deposit, no guesswork.
home.howHeading: We build it. You see it. You own it.
home.step1Body: We research your restaurant, pull your menu, photos, and brand — and build a complete website. No deposit required.
home.step2Body: Get a live link to your fully built site. No imagination needed — it's already done and ready to launch.
home.step3Body: Love it? Click to pay and your site goes live. We handle hosting, security, and ongoing support.
home.packagesSub: No surprise fees. Cancel any time.
home.whyHeading: Built for Puerto Rico restaurants. By people who know PR.
home.why1Body: We know Puerto Rico — the culture, the market, and what resonates with local guests and tourists alike.
home.why2Body: We don't do everything. We do one thing exceptionally well: restaurant websites in Puerto Rico.
home.why3Body: If it helps your guests decide faster, your site can include clear Spanish and English pages.
home.why4Body: You see a finished product before you spend a cent. That's a first in this market.
home.ctaHeading: Stop being the restaurant they couldn't find.
home.ctaBody: We'll build your free preview site — with your menu, your photos, your brand. No commitment. If you love it, it's yours for $97/mo.
home.opportunityHeading: Puerto Rico welcomed 3.3 million tourists last year.
home.opportunityHeadingAccent: Most of them couldn't find a menu.
home.opportunityBody: Visitors arrive hungry, excited, and with money to spend. The first thing they do is search Google for a place to eat near them. If your restaurant isn't there — with a real website, real photos, and a real menu — they'll find someone else who is.
home.stat2Label: of diners check a restaurant's website before visiting
home.stat3Label: is all it takes to be found
home.costHeading: Every day without a website is a table that didn't fill.
home.costSub: It's not just about looking professional. It's about being discoverable at the exact moment someone is deciding where to eat tonight.
home.cost1Body: When a tourist types 'restaurants near me' or 'best mofongo in San Juan,' restaurants without websites rank far lower — or don't appear at all. You're not competing. You're invisible.
home.cost2Title: Your menu is a JPEG from 2022.
home.cost2Body: We've heard it directly from visitors: 'We wanted to go but we couldn't figure out what they served.' A photo on Instagram is not a menu. It's a barrier.
home.cost3Body: First-time visitors — especially tourists who can't ask a neighbor — look for signals of legitimacy. A professional website closes that trust gap instantly.
home.trapHeading: Instagram is great. It's just not a website.
home.trapBody1: Facebook and Instagram are rented land. The algorithm changes. Reach disappears overnight. And when someone tries to find your hours, your phone number, or your full menu — they have to scroll through months of posts hoping to find a photo that might be current.
home.trapBody2: A website is yours. It shows up on Google. It answers questions at 11pm when your restaurant is closed. It works for you 24 hours a day.
home.buildHeading: We build your full website before you pay a cent.
home.buildSub: No other agency does this. Not one.
home.buildBody1: Every other web agency asks for a deposit upfront. They show you a mockup — a flat image you have to squint at and imagine. Then you wait weeks before seeing anything real. By the time you know if you love it, you've already paid.
home.buildBody2: We do the opposite. We research your restaurant, write your copy, design your pages, build your menu — the whole thing. Then we send you a live link to a working website with your name on it. Real pages. Real photos. Ready to launch.
home.buildBody3: If you love it, we flip the switch and it goes live. If you don't, you walk away. Nothing owed. No pressure. No risk.

services.heroSub: Pick the plan that fits your restaurant. Every package includes a professionally built Next.js website on fast Vercel hosting.

portfolio.heroSub: Every site is built custom — same attention to detail, unique to each restaurant.

howItWorks.heroHeading: From idea to live site — you're in control.
howItWorks.heroSub: We flipped the traditional web agency model on its head. You never have to imagine what your site will look like.

localSeo.heroHeading: Get found on Google. Fill more tables.
localSeo.heroSub: Most Puerto Rico restaurants are invisible on Google. We fix that.

about.heroHeading: Built in Puerto Rico, for Puerto Rico.
about.heroSub: Sabor Web is a restaurant-only web agency. We build websites for PR restaurants — and we live here too.

contact.heroSub: Tell us your restaurant and we'll build a free preview site. No commitment, no credit card.
contact.success: Got it! We'll build your preview and be in touch within 24 hours.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or WhatsApp us directly.
